Roey Rahmil (415-773-7283; RRahmil@sflaw.com) of Shartsis Friese LLP for Plaintiff.
Corban Porter (CPorter@maynardcooper.com) for Defendants, MONY LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA, PROTECTIVE LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY.

DEFENDANTs MONY LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA and PROTECTIVE LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend.

[see word minutes for details.]

orders signed.

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EQUITABLE ADVISORS, LLC (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS AXA, DANIEL WORTHINGTON MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE:

The verified application of David T. McDowell to appear pro hac vice as counsel to Defendants is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

Counsel for the defendants is required to submit a proposed order to dept 302, which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
